e/b/pub/ssuprem3.help July 1, 2004 EECS Instruction provided Silvaco SSUPREM3 for EECS classes until 2004. For a while, it was funded by pay-per-use licensing via http://www.eecad.com. Stanford University still provides suprem3

.com. Stanford University still provides suprem3 from http://www-tcad.stanford.edu/, but it is unsupported. We now provide TSUPREM4 from Synopsys; please see http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/cgi-bin/pub.cgi?file=tsuprem4.help EECS Instructional
b.cgi?file=tsuprem4.help EECS Instructional Support Group 378/384/386 Cory, 333 Soda inst@eecs.berkeley.edu
